shows.title: 2026 FIFA World Cup
shows.description: Portugal vs. DR Congo in a Group K opener in Houston, Texas. At 41, Cristiano Ronaldo begins his sixth World Cup with eight career goals in the tournament, one shy of the nine scored by Eusebio in the 1966 World Cup alone, where Portugal finished third. Twenty years younger is Joao Neves, a midfield force to watch much like Noah Sadiki of DR Congo, which last made it here as Zaire in 1974. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Renovation Aloha
shows.description: When Kamohai and Tristyn rebuild her childhood home, the renovation becomes deeply personal. Tight budgets, sky-high expectations, and family emotions collide, turning this project into their most meaningful and pressure-filled challenge yet. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: 2026 FIFA World Cup
shows.description: Spain vs. Cape Verde in a Group H opener in Atlanta, Ga. The island nation of Cape Verde makes its World Cup debut after overcoming the likes of Cameroon in African qualifying. Captained by former Ligue 1 and EPL forward Ryan Mendes, the Blue Sharks swim against an ultra-talented foe in reigning European champion Spain, featuring 18-year-old Lamine Yamal among its many playmaking options. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Renovation Aloha

shows.title: Tracker

Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.description: An ecological overview is featured in this documentary series. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: The New Edition Story
shows.description: Conclusion. New Edition reaches unparalleled heights of success, but whether they can put their differences behind them remains an open question. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: The New Edition Story
shows.description: Part 2 of 3. Though New Edition become an R&B sensation, fame comes at a steep price as internal tension and external pressure leads its members to put business before friendship. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: The New Edition Story
shows.description: Part 1 of 3. The lives of five childhood friends from the projects of Roxbury, Mass., change after they form a singing group to win local talent shows and ultimately become the R&B group New Edition. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Planet Earth II
shows.episodeTitle: The Making of Planet Earth II
shows.description: A behind-the-scenes look at the making of episodes from "Planet Earth II." Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Planet Earth
shows.description: The producers and crew behind "Planet Earth" discuss their adventures while shooting the documentary series. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Planet Earth
shows.description: Examining ecosystems and their link to freshwater sources. Included: otters; crocodiles; snow geese; piranha. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Planet Earth
shows.description: Examining high-altitude geology and survival strategies of the creatures that live there. Included: snow leopards in the Himalayas; pumas in the Andes. Narrated by Sigourney Weaver. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Planet Earth
shows.description: Aquatic creatures are observed in their ocean habitats, including whale sharks, dolphins, crabs, eels and octopi. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Planet Earth
shows.description: Trees are Earth's largest organisms and are also one of the planet's oldest inhabitants. Seasonal forests (unlike tropical rain-forest) are the largest land habitats. A third of all trees grow in the endless taiga of the Arctic north. Northern America has forests that include California's sequoias, the Earth's largest trees. There and elsewhere, their vast production of photosynthesis and shade presides over a seasonal cycle of life and involves countless plant and animal species. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Planet Earth
shows.description: Examining shallow seas that lie above continental shelves, where sunlight can reach the seabed. Included: the rich and varied aquatic life of coral reefs. Narrated by Sigourney Weaver. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Planet Earth
shows.description: Grasslands, prairies, plains and savannas are examined, including areas of Mongolia, Africa and Papua New Guinea. Also: Arctic tundra. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Planet Earth
shows.description: Polar-bear migrations are observed in this documentary examining frozen habitats. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Planet Earth
shows.description: Mexico's Cave of the Swallows is visited. Also: a look at the Lechuguilla cave system; stalactites, stalagmites and troglodytes. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Marley & Me
shows.description: A Philadelphia newspaper columnist and his wife move to Florida and adopt a precocious Labrador puppy that quickly turns their lives upside down. Jennifer Aniston and Owen Wilson star in this heartwarming adaptation of John Grogan's bestseller. Alan Arkin, Eric Dane, Kathleen Turner. Directed by David Frankel. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Planet Earth II
shows.description: In the series premiere, animal life on remote islands is examined. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Planet Earth II
shows.description: Cities are examined. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Planet Earth II
shows.description: Grasslands are spotlighted. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Planet Earth II
shows.description: Deserts are explored. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Planet Earth II
shows.description: In the series premiere, jungles and wildlife who inhabit them are examined. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Planet Earth II
shows.description: Mountain ranges are explored. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Planet Earth: South Pacific
shows.description: Witness the birth, growth, and death of an island in the greatest ocean on Earth. Millions of years are condensed into one hour, revealing unforgettable images of an erupting underwater volcano and rivers of lava exploding below the waves. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Planet Earth: South Pacific
shows.description: A look at sharks and whales in the South Pacific. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Planet Earth: South Pacific
shows.description: A look at the colonization of remote South Pacific islands. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: The Good Dinosaur
shows.description: In this enchanting computer-animated fantasy, set in a world where the dinosaurs never went extinct, an amiable young Apatosaurus befriends a prehistoric human child as he embarks on a journey to reunite with his family. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Despicable Me
shows.description: This endearing comic adventure centers on an elite supervillain who attempts to steal the moon from the sky, but the affections of three orphaned girls threaten to undermine his evil machinations. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: The Incredibles
shows.description: After years in a federal relocation program, a former crimefighting superhero and his superpower family unretire and rejoin the fight against evildoers. The wildly imaginative and fun-filled joyride was written and directed by Brad Bird ("The Iron Giant"), who also provides the voice of fashion maven Edna "E" Mode, who is patterned after famed Hollywood costume designer Edith Head. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Up
shows.description: A septuagenarian reluctantly teams up with a kid explorer in a hilarious and heart-thumping adventure that won an Oscar as Best Animated Feature Film. Carl Fredricksen is an irascible old codger determined to travel to South America by tying helium balloons to his house. The only kink in his plan is the 8-year-old stowed away on his front porch. Despite their differences, the unlikely pair make a perfect team when it comes to taking on the dangers of the wilderness. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Monsters University
shows.description: Mike and Sulley attend Monsters University and develop a heated rivalry that puts their education in danger in this frightfully fun prequel set before they were both star employees at Monsters, Inc. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Monsters, Inc.
shows.description: In this computer-animated delight, Billy Crystal and John Goodman provide the voices of Mike and Sulley, the "top scarers" at an energy factory in Monstropolis, a city powered by the screams of children terrified by creatures who lurk in their closets. Other voices include Steve Buscemi and Jennifer Tilly. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Toy Story 2
shows.description: Buzz and the gang race to save Woody after he's kidnapped by a greedy toy collector who's intent on making a lucrative online sale in this exciting sequel. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Toy Story
shows.description: Computer-animated tale centering on the rivalry between two children's toys: Woody, a cowboy doll who's the leader and the brains of the group, and a cocky spaceman named Buzz Lightyear. But the two learn to band together when they're faced with the bratty kid from next door, who just loves to make mincemeat out of toys. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Home
shows.description: After Earth is taken over by an alien race known as Boov, a human girl and a misfit extraterrestrial find themselves on a road trip that will play a vital role in intergalactic relations in this charming animated comedy. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Toy Story 3
shows.description: Andy's toys land in day-care after he leaves for college, and hatch a daring escape plan in this fantastic addition to the "Toy Story" series. Meanwhile, some of the gang's new friends aren't quite what they seem. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: WALL-E
shows.description: A CGI-animated delight and an exhilarating family adventure set on a wasteland Earth circa 2800. A centuries-old trash compactor named WALL-E (Waste Allocation Load Lifter Earth Class), romances a sleek, high-tech android visitor named EVE (Extraterrestrial Vegetation Evaluator). Featuring the voice talent of Ben Burtt and Elissa Knight as the main characters. Written and directed by Andrew Stanton. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Cars 2
shows.description: In this action-packed family blockbuster, superstar race car Lightning McQueen prepares to compete in the World Grand Prix, while his best friend Mater accidentally becomes involved in international espionage. The whole crew must work together to rescue Mater, stop the bad guys and win the big race. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Cars
shows.description: A cocky hot rod gets stranded in a desert town en route to a big race, and gets a long-overdue lesson in humility in this fantastic Pixar hit. With the help of the town's quirky cars, he learns that life is more about the voyage than winning the race. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Cloudy With a Chance of Meatballs
shows.description: An inventor and a weather-reporter intern try to discover why the sky is raining food instead of water in this charming adaptation of the children's book by Ron and Judi Barrett. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Puss in Boots
shows.description: Swashbuckling feline Puss in Boots (voice of Antonio Banderas) fights to save his town with the help of Kitty Softpaws (voice of Salma Hayek) and Humpty Dumpty (voice of Zach Galifianakis) in this sweeping animated adventure for the whole family. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Adventures in Babysitting
shows.description: Teenage babysitting rivals team up to track down one of their young charges who snuck away in the big city. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Finding Nemo
shows.description: Best Animated Feature about a clown fish who teams up with a ditzy blue tang to search for his missing son. This witty, sweet and beautifully animated undersea adventure was produced by Disney and Pixar Studios, which also released "Monsters, Inc." Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Rudolph the Red-Nosed Reindeer
shows.description: The reindeer with the incandescent nose guides Santa's sleigh through a bad storm on Christmas Eve. Based on the song by Johnny Marks. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Dr. Seuss' The Lorax
shows.description: In this charming adaptation of the Dr. Seuss story, a young boy seeks to impress his pretty neighbor by getting a tree, since real vegetation in their land is rare. In the process, he meets the Lorax, a cantankerous yet endearing forest dweller. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: The Polar Express
shows.description: A doubting 8-year-old boy is whisked to the North Pole on a magical train for a meeting with Santa in this dazzling animated Christmas fable. Meanwhile, the boy's crisis in faith turns into a wondrous journey of self-discovery. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Dr. Seuss' How the Grinch Stole Christmas
shows.description: Jim Carrey is inspired as the mean, green Grinch in director Ron Howard's enchanting big-screen adaptation of Dr. Seuss's beloved children's fantasy. The classic holiday tale is vividly brought to life as the coldhearted Grinch plots to rob Whoville of its Yule celebration by masquerading as Santa and stealing all the presents. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Brave
shows.description: In this sweeping adventure, Princess Merida relies on her bravery and archery skills to battle an ancient curse and restore peace to the Scottish Highlands after she makes a wish that puts her entire kingdom in jeopardy. * Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: The Little Mermaid
shows.description: A young mermaid strikes a deal with a sea witch to become human in order to land the man of her dreams, even though her father has forbidden her to swim to the surface. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: A Bug's Life
shows.description: An A-list of vocal talent---Dave Foley, Kevin Spacey, Julia Louis-Dreyfus, Phyllis Diller---brings this animated gem to life. An ant colony is terrorized by tyrannical, voracious grasshoppers who demand an annual food tribute from the ants be replaced after it is accidentally lost by Flik, an inventive but bumbling ant. So Flik leaves home to find insect warriors to help save his colony. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Miss Congeniality 2: Armed and Fabulous
shows.description: In this charming sequel, an FBI agent's newfound celebrity interferes with her undercover work. This time out, her big case involves finding a kidnapped beauty-pageant winner. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Ready or Not
shows.description: A bride's wedding night takes a sinister turn when her eccentric new in-laws force her to take part in a terrifying game. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: FBI: International
shows.description: When an American basketball player for a Lithuanian team goes into cardiac arrest, the team investigates along with Zoey McKenna, the new agent appointed by Dandridge. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: 2 Fast 2 Furious
shows.description: Paul Walker puts the pedal to the metal in this high-octane sequel to 2001's "The Fast and the Furious." Walker returns as Brian O'Conner, a cop skilled at street racing. This time out, he goes undercover in Miami to take down a drug magnate. The result: relentless action, kinetic street racing and gravity-defying car chases. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Kong: Skull Island
shows.description: A disillusioned soldier and a photojournalist join an expedition to Skull Island in this monstrously fun reboot. There, the group get caught up in an ongoing war between a gigantic ape called King Kong and the area's indigenous predators. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Ocean's Eight
shows.description: Five years, eight months, 12 days and counting, that's how long Debbie Ocean has been devising the biggest heist of her life. She knows what it's going to take, a team of the best people in the field, starting with her partner-in-crime Lou Miller. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Eraser
shows.description: Arnold Schwarzenegger stars in this slam-bang, high-tech actioner as John Kruger, an expert at "erasing" identities. Kruger must protect a woman (Vanessa Williams) from international assassins after she sees weapons technology sold to the underworld. Directed by Charles Russell. James Caan, James Coburn, Robert Pastorelli, James Cromwell. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Greenland
shows.description: Upon hearing the news that a huge comet will hit Earth within 48 hours and start the dreaded apocalypse, John Garrity, his estranged wife Allison, and their son Nathan decide to make their way to Greenland, where a group of bunkers is located. The journey, however, proves to be more perilous than they anticipated. Amidst the growing panic and lawlessness around them, the family tries their hardest to catch the last flight to the last possible safe haven on the planet. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Without a Trace
shows.description: A TV journalist (April Grace) whom Jack knows vanishes the night her station airs her story about a heroin dealer (Christian Camargo) who ordered a murder. Jack's team thinks the reporter's source may have some answers regarding her whereabouts. Meanwhile, things get personal for Jack when the prime suspect threatens his wife (Talia Balsam) and daughters. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: The Departed
shows.description: Martin Scorsese won a long-awaited Best Director Oscar for this crime epic, about an undercover cop who infiltrates a Boston mob crew that has a mole in the state police department. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Without a Trace
shows.description: A highly decorated Army officer (Steve Eastin) with 34 years of service disappears after his retirement dinner, leaving his dress uniform, medals and an empty gun holster in his hotel room. Sykes: William Sanderson. Aybar: Ernie Hudson. Jack: Anthony LaPaglia. Samantha: Poppy Montgomery. Danny: Enrique Murciano. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Without a Trace
shows.description: A 16-year-old girl vanishes from a locked room in a psychiatric hospital, and it appears she may have escaped with the participation of a staff member. The team learns of a troubling incident from her past that may hold the key to her disappearance. Samantha: Poppy Montgomery. Vivian: Marianne Jean-Baptiste. Jack: Anthony LaPaglia. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Without a Trace
shows.description: Jack and his team investigate the disappearance of a flight attendant (Heather Donahue) who may have been having a relationship with a pilot. Dr. Morrison: Tim Matheson. Patti: Sarah Rafferty. Jack: Anthony LaPaglia. Samantha: Poppy Montgomery. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: The Legend of Tarzan
shows.description: This thrilling adventure yarn finds an older and wiser Tarzan returning to the Congo to act as a trade representative for England. There, he clashes with a greedy Belgian captain who has sinister plans for his old home. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Last Man Standing
shows.description: Mandy dates an animal-rights supporter, who doesn't see eye to eye with hunting enthusiast Mike. Elsewhere, Kyle and Ed bond over their newly discovered shared heritage. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Last Man Standing
shows.description: Chuck's dog gets pregnant by the Baxters' canine, and Chuck is displeased about his purebred German shepherd delivering a litter of mutts. Meanwhile, Mandy hits a parked car, and Eve feels compelled to leave a note. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Last Man Standing
shows.description: Roses arrive anonymously at the Baxter home on Valentine's Day, and there are several suspects. However, Mike is not among them, because he gifts Vanessa with a Taser. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Without a Trace
shows.description: A 13-year-old girl disappears on her way to school and the only clue is her discarded video camera found on a road in the opposite direction of the school. Jack: Anthony LaPaglia. Samantha: Poppy Montgomery. Vivian: Marianne Jean-Baptiste. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Scorpion
shows.description: Walter and Paige end up stranded in the Pacific Ocean surrounded by sharks after their boat explodes during the team's mission to locate sunken treasure. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Scorpion
shows.description: The team must rescue a man teetering on the edge of a massive sinkhole that threatens to destroy Los Angeles' water supply. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Last Man Standing
shows.description: Mike's father and brother arrive in town and want to bid on constructing a new Outdoor Man store, reigniting a sibling rivalry between the brothers. Meanwhile, the girls help their grandfather enter the world of online dating. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Chicago Med
shows.episodeTitle: A Little Change Might Do You Some Good
shows.description: Charles and Nellie help an elderly patient and her developmentally disabled grandson. Will treats a high school swimmer with a heart condition. Crockett considers using the O.R. 2.0 for surgery. Hannah and Dr. Justin Lieu search for a patient's missing pregnant wife in the woods. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Scorpion
shows.description: The team's electronics-free getaway in the mountains on Christmas Eve takes a dangerous turn when they encounter a group of gunrunners who kidnap Ralph. Meanwhile, Tim makes an important decision about his role with Team Scorpion. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Scorpion
shows.description: Walter's forced to swim through the deadly La Brea Tar Pits in order to save a woman who's trapped in the tar before she runs out of oxygen. Elsewhere, Veronica helps Ralph with his troop's cookie sale, unbeknownst to Paige. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Scorpion
shows.description: Paige's estranged mother enlists the team's help when she accidentally uncovers a forgotten nuclear reactor that's on the verge of exploding. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Scorpion
shows.description: The team travel to Ireland to attend Megan's memorial, but Walter discovers a natural disaster in a nearby lake created a poisonous cloud that's threatening the entire village. Meanwhile, Cabe and Toby try to alleviate tension between Tim and Walter. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Last Man Standing
shows.description: Boyd's school may undergo a name change following Boyd's eye-opening report on its namesake. Elsewhere, Mandy turns to Blanca for assistance with a class project. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Scorpion
shows.episodeTitle: We're Gonna Need a Bigger Vote
shows.description: The team must stop someone who tries to intervene in the U.S. presidential election on Election Day. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Last Man Standing
shows.description: Boyd acts restless at school, prompting his teacher to recommend ADHD medication for him. Elsewhere, Mandy turns a new leaf regarding schoolwork and devotes a significant amount of time to studying. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Scorpion
shows.description: The team ventures into a vast cave system to prevent a bat population from destroying the North American ecosystem before Halloween. Then, the team helps stage pictures of Halloweens from Walter's past for his upcoming immigration inspection. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Scorpion
shows.description: The team must stop thieves who robbed a rare-gem exhibit at a museum in order to extract materials needed to enrich a nuclear bomb. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
shows.description: Boyle enthusiastically pursues a new romance, but Jake steps in to keep him from moving too quickly. Elsewhere, Rosa and Amy have fun at the expense of a costumed crime fighter; and Capt. Holt has a new foe. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
shows.description: Terry returns to the field and learns from Jake how to control his emotions. Elsewhere, Amy and Rosa investigate after someone breaks into Gina's apartment. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Last Man Standing
shows.description: Boyd's father, played by Nick Jonas, returns unexpectedly, which troubles Mike and Kyle; and Mandy is hired by Ed to be an elf at the shop, and she organizes the other elves to demand perks. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: FBI: International
shows.description: The Fly Team races through the streets of Budapest to halt a major art heist about to be perpetrated by an American. Also, Forrester grows angry as Dandridge watches every move the team makes. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Last Man Standing
shows.description: Eve posts Mike's video blog on her social-media page and her classmates balk at his views, but she stands by her dad. Meanwhile, the Baxters land in hot water when a local cop patrols the area. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Last Man Standing
shows.description: Bud's harsh method of disciplining Boyd doesn't sit well with Kristin, Ryan and—to Bud's surprise—Mike. Elsewhere, Mandy buys a new hat for Kyle, and he's confused by the meaning behind this gift. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Without a Trace
shows.description: A 17-year-old vanishes from his private-school campus and the head of the school (Conor O'Farrell) may be involved. Patrick: Blake Bashoff. Andy: Jared Hillman. Jack: Anthony LaPaglia. Samantha: Poppy Montgomery. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
shows.description: A local pizza place burns down and the fire marshal (Patton Oswalt) rashly pins blame on the owner, prompting Jake to pull out all the stops to prove him wrong. Meanwhile, a computer virus at the precinct shares everyone's browser history. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Last Man Standing
shows.description: Vanessa persuades Mandy to dump Kyle, but then she regrets meddling and tries to repair things, doing even more harm in the process. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
shows.description: Jake becomes enamored with a medical examiner he meets at a crime scene, and his crush affects his work. Elsewhere, Amy discovers that Sgt. Jeffords has artistic abilities. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
shows.description: Jake has a run of bad luck closing cases. Meanwhile, Amy turns to Rosa and Gina for help after she's asked to lead the Junior Policeman Program for troubled youth; and Boyle helps Sergeant Jeffords with a troublesome case. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Last Man Standing
shows.description: A downsized Thanksgiving is celebrated by the Baxters because Kristin and Mandy can't be there. Meanwhile, Eve's decision to skip a beloved tradition saddens Vanessa; and Kristin learns that Mandy's not being honest about her Thanksgiving plans. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Last Man Standing
shows.description: Mike gets a classic car as a birthday present from his family, but he doesn't get much alone time with his car because its former owner keeps stopping by. Meanwhile, Mandy thinks it's unfair when Vanessa gives Eve permission to go to a music festival. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Without a Trace
shows.description: A bride disappears at her own wedding and suspicions of kidnapping fall on the guests in attendance. Meanwhile, the team explores the relationship between the newlyweds, who were raised together for a short time. Jack: Anthony LaPaglia. Vivian: Marianne Jean-Baptiste. Danny: Enrique Murciano. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Last Man Standing
shows.description: The Baxters' hiring of a new housekeeper brings with it questions of immigration, which ultimately lead Ed to check the green-card status of employees at Outdoor Man. Meanwhile, Kristin comes up with a clever moneymaking plan. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: The Good Doctor
shows.description: When the team treats a patient who has to decide between a dangerous surgery that could change his life or remain the same, he asks Dr. Shaun Murphy what he would if he had that same choice. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Without a Trace
shows.description: A man who has been searching for his missing son for the last six years disappears himself, leaving his wedding ring and a mountain of debt behind. Vivian: Marianne Jean-Baptiste. Danny: Enrique Murciano. Martin: Eric Close. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Last Man Standing
shows.description: After Vanessa's disastrous presentation at career day, Eve insists that her mother resign from her environmentally irresponsible company. Mike defends Vanessa, but Eve won't back down. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Without a Trace
shows.description: Jack and his team search for a missing pregnant woman (Nicole DeHuff) who has a medical condition that could lead to her death if she's not found within 24 hours. The investigation unearths an illegal, though benevolent, group that has the expectant mother in protective care. But if its members divulge her whereabouts, they risk exposure. Paul Dobson: Jeffrey Pierce. Mary Kandel: Natalija Nogulich. Dianne: Damara Reilly. Susan Posi: Mary Kay Wulf. Michael Posi: Steve Ryan. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Without a Trace
shows.description: A man leaves home in the morning with his 6-year-old daughter, planning to take her to school and to open his dry-cleaning store, but they both vanish. Samantha: Poppy Montgomery. Jack: Anthony LaPaglia. Martin: Eric Close. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Last Man Standing
shows.description: Vanessa is acknowledged for her volunteer efforts, but her good news is overshadowed by Mike, who then tries to remedy the situation. Meanwhile, Eve becomes apprehensive about starting high school; and Ed wants to use Mike as a model for an Outdoor Man figurine. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Without a Trace
shows.description: A doctor (Dariush Kashani) of Saudi Arabian descent with an exemplary record mysteriously vanishes, and Martin (Eric Close) is quick to suspect the man of being a terrorist. Kamal: Ammar Daraiseh. Abner: John Finn. Jack: Anthony LaPaglia. Samantha: Poppy Montgomery. Danny: Enrique Murciano. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Without a Trace
shows.description: A 16-year-old foster child vanishes after leaving his job to go home. Jack: Anthony LaPaglia. Samantha: Poppy Montgomery. Vivian: Marianne Jean-Baptiste. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Without a Trace
shows.description: The team investigates when the child of a prominent assistant district attorney (Marin Hinkle) vanishes in a public park. There are several suspects, but not enough evidence for the team to set up its customary timeline. Matthew: John Mese. Rosa: Melody Butiu. Clarissa: Elizabeth Banks. Zoe: Jessa French. Samantha: Poppy Montgomery. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Without a Trace
shows.description: Jack and his team investigate the disappearance of the VP (Erich Anderson) of an investment-banking firm who vanished at a San Diego airport and left behind two empty suitcases. Katherine: Colleen Flynn. Noah Ridder: Philip Baker Hall. Amalia: Angela Alvarado. Danny: Enrique Murciano. Martin: Eric Close Samantha: Poppy Montgomery. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Without a Trace
shows.description: The team investigates the disappearance of a 19-year-old aspiring model (Kaitlin Doubleday) who left a half-packed suitcase on the bed in her apartment. Chet: Charles S. Dutton. Rina: Benita Krista Nall. Jack: Anthony LaPaglia. Samantha: Poppy Montgomery. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Without a Trace
shows.description: Four witnesses claim that a woman was abducted from a mall parking lot while her husband was standing just yards away with his back to her. Samantha: Poppy Montgomery. Jack: Anthony LaPaglia. Martin: Eric Close. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Without a Trace
shows.description: When a father takes his son to a baseball game for his 11th birthday, the boy inadvertently gets on a subway car without his dad and vanishes. As the case progresses, investigators learn the boy may have wanted to disappear. Samantha: Poppy Montgomery. Jack: Anthony LaPaglia. Martin: Eric Close. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Without a Trace
shows.description: The team investigates the disappearance of a single professional woman (Arija Bareikis), who has been missing for 38 hours. Paul Cartwright: Bruce Davison. Bart: Bradford Tatum. Samantha: Poppy Montgomery. Martin: Eric Close. Danny: Enrique Murciano. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Last Man Standing
shows.description: Manly man Mike Baxter decides to spend more time at home with his three daughters when, in the opener, his time on the road creating a catalog as marketing director for a sporting-goods store is reduced and his wife gets a promotion. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Last Man Standing
shows.description: Mike gives Mandy tips about her online clothing company by suggesting she set aside money for taxes, but she has a different plan: She opens a pop-up store at her grandfather's marijuana shop. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Last Man Standing
shows.description: Vanessa and Carol prank their husbands after the men skip out on giving out Halloween candy in favor of watching football. Elsewhere, Kyle dons an Ed costume because he considers Ed his hero, but Ed has an unexpected reaction to this. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Last Man Standing
shows.description: Mike wants Boyd to walk home from school on his own, but Ryan's hesitant to allow this. Meanwhile, Ed and Kyle host a meeting for folks preparing for doomsday; and Eve and Mandy try to keep Vanessa in the dark about something. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Last Man Standing

Ford's Henry Ford II wants in on the success, and so he journeys to Italy to propose a merger with the automobile giant. His plan, however, is met with ridicule. With a hurt ego, he enlists the help of car designer Carroll Shelby and driver Ken Miles to build a car that would defeat Ferrari at the 1966 24 Hours of Le Mans. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine

They set off into uncharted waters, and soon enough, they come upon a haven that can provide for their needs. Unfortunately, there is a small problem: another family has already taken residence in the area. They are the Bettermans, and they have an intricately-made treehouse, effective farming, and many impressive inventions. It doesn't take long for the prehistoric to clash with the modern. When an operation to kill the drug lords responsible goes south, the agent must lead the rescue on his own. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Dirty Jobs

shows.description: The host visits the La Brea Tar Pits in California; farm animals are rendered and recycled. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.description: Mike visits Big Lake, Alaska, to learn how to breed and train sled dogs. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.description: Mike tries to shrink-wrap a houseboat in Kentucky and visits a reindeer farm in Palmer, Alaska. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.description: Mike Rowe joins a California construction crew to learn the art of concrete stamping. He also takes care of penguins and digs for bloodworms. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.description: Mike returns to Alaska to protect the environment by cleaning up an oil spill; in Minnesota, he joins a salvage team to retrieve a car that fell through the ice in a lake. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

The other is in a gated community. Gated communities have Homeowners Associations which can make renovation projects a nightmare. Jamil and the crew could drown in all the red tape. A costly renovation forces them to seek out additional funding through a loan but the interest cuts into their profits. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

Her police investigation leads to the slow and painful disintegration of his once-enviable career, marriage, and sanity. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Triple Digit Flip
shows.description: Jamil, Pace, and Rahima choose between a tiny house or a Frankenhouse. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.description: A talented garden designer uses his office as a place to showcase various plants and plant combinations. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Dead Silent
shows.description: In 1979, a walk in the woods turns out to be a deadly mistake for single mom Marie Huckins. Twenty years later, her daughter Patricia follows in the same fateful footsteps. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Dead Silent

shows.description: Bringing the Thomas Family Home for the Big Reveal as they see their new and improved home. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.description: When Cynthia Smith and David Mueller meet, there's an instant connection. But when a tragic illness strikes, they might keep the spark alive, or break their sacred marriage vows. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.description: Matt and Niqué Leili's perfect love story is torn apart forever on July 8, 2011. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: The Perfect Murder
shows.description: The disappearance of a 44-year-old masseuse from her apartment in Miami is investigated. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: The Perfect Murder
shows.description: The case of a Miami businessman who disappeared the night before a family vacation. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Garden Smart
shows.episodeTitle: Plan Your Garden For All Seasons
shows.description: An accomplished horticulturist shows his gardening tips for the bleak months. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Dead Silent
shows.description: Connie Hilton and her husband George leave Dallas and move to a rural enclave in East Texas. Life couldn't be more perfect. But one early September morning, their peaceful, easy-living country life is abruptly and brutally shattered for good. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Dead Silent
shows.description: Heather Young has recently moved to Michigan's Lower Peninsula with her boyfriend before a fight broke out which lead to serious consequences. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Trespass
shows.description: In this unrelentingly tense thriller directed by Joel Schumacher, a wealthy man (Nicolas Cage) and his family fight back against a gang of violent home invaders led by a cunning criminal who has been plotting the robbery for months. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.description: A house in the hills is a dream of Jamil's, so taking a project in a great Phoenix neighborhood is enticing to the team. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Taken
shows.description: Un exagente de la CIA se ve inmerso en una desesperada búsqueda de su hija adolescente, que fue secuestrada mientras se encontraba de viaje en París por miembros de una oscura banda criminal dedicada al comercio sexual. Bryan Mills vuelve así a la acción, como en sus mejores épocas, y debe moverse rápido por varios países de Europa antes que el tiempo se le acabe para dar con el paradero de Kim, atrapada por esta cruel red de trata de personas. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Garden Smart

shows.description: A college addresses the importance of farm-to-table while educating the future of the country. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.description: The Thomas Family Home is coming together and the team are putting some finishes touches before the Big Reveal. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Dr. Death
shows.description: Duntsch faces his host of victims. Meanwhile, Kirby, Henderson, and Shughart deliver their strike. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Triple Digit Flip
shows.description: For Jamil and his team--it's time to choose between two houses that couldn't be more different. When they finally come to a decision, the renovation is far from smooth sailing. The home they choose causes them to go over time and budget because Jamil wants nothing less than perfection. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.description: Joanna shares her night-in favorites by making beef tenderloin, prosciutto-wrapped apples, Brussels sprouts and mocha trifle cups. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Sherlock Holmes in Terror by Night
shows.description: Master sleuth Sherlock Holmes is hired by the wealthy widow Lady Margaret and her son Roland Carstairs to prevent the theft of an enormous diamond known as the 'Star of Rhodesia'. Travelling by train from London to Edinburgh, Holmes guards the priceless jewel with the help of Dr Watson and Inspector Lestrade. But when the diamond disappears and Roland is found murdered, Holmes must deduce the murderer's identity from among the speeding train's many suspicious passengers. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Military Makeover
shows.episodeTitle: Making Good Progress on The Thomas Home (#3203)
shows.description: With demolition complete, the design team begin to bring their vision to life on the Thomas Home renovations. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: The Pioneer Woman
shows.description: Ree Drummond is testing delicious ideas for kitchen hacks to up her breakfast game. There's a shortcut to the divine with Chocolate Chip Hazelnut Pancakes. She's going experimental with a crazy Omelet in a Bag and unleashing the waffle iron for cheesy hacked Wafflemaker Hash Browns. To get ahead, there's Strawberries and Cream Muesli and a Mango Marvel Smoothie pack. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Christopher Kimball's Milk Street Television
shows.description: Christopher visits Ana Sortun to learn a recipe for Turkish stuffed flatbreads. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Christopher Kimball's Milk Street Television
shows.description: This episode looks at Argentinian techniques and flavors, from perfectly cooked meat to an eye-catching salad. First, it's oven-perfect strip steak with chimichurri with Milk Street cook Bianca Borges, who uses the reverse sear method for strip steaks served with a spicy chili and oregano sauce. Then, Milk Street cook Catherine Smart makes a colorful shaved carrot salad with poppy seeds and parsley. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: First Home Fix
shows.description: The team work on a home that has undergone several renovations and additions in the past. The challenge is to make the different parts work together and achieve full functionality. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Christopher Kimball's Milk Street Television
shows.description: Rayna Jhaveri makes Goan-Style Chili-Fry with Beef, Tomatoes and Potatoes, a dish that fuses ingredients, flavors and techniques from different parts of the world. Then, Sam Fore prepares Thai-Style Vegetable Stir-Fry with Garlic and Black Pepper and Lynn Clark makes crispy Salt and Pepper Tofu. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Christopher Kimball's Milk Street Television
shows.description: This episode features recipes found across Italy, from Puglia to Sardinia. First, it's tomato-olive focaccia with milk street cook Erika Bruce, who shows that the secret to light and crisp focaccia is a higher water content than expected. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: The Pioneer Woman
shows.description: Ree Drummond tackles a fun, Thanksgiving-themed Q and A. Included: an awesome Thanksgiving breakfast casserole; pumpkin tiramisu; Nan's cranberry sauce; and classic finger foods. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: The Pioneer Woman
shows.description: Ree Drummond hosts a three-day countdown to a frontier-style Thanksgiving dinner. Make-ahead dishes include maple-whiskey turkey; very berry cranberry sauce; Parker House rolls; mashed potatoes with shallots; and herbed cornbread for Southern dressing. Also: Ree's recipes for Brussels sprouts; and pumpkin-gingersnap cheesecake with salted caramel sauce. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Christopher Kimball's Milk Street Television
shows.description: Christopher Kimball takes inspiration from Crete to create a Cretan Salad, a cross between classic Greek salad and Italian panzanella. Rayna Jhaveri then makes Turkish Chickpea Salad that uses sumac and fresh herbs to balance earthy chickpeas. Finally, Erica Bruce demonstrates Garlicky Lentil and Parsley Salad with Feta. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Knives Out
shows.description: Una fiesta familiar tiene un final inesperado y trágico cuando muere uno de los invitados. Más tarde, dos detectives son asignados para llevar a cabo la investigación y búsqueda de pistas que los ayuden a obtener al responsable del crimen. No obstante, resolver el caso no parece una tarea fácil. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Brightburn
shows.description: After an alien boy arrives on Earth and is adopted by a local couple, he lives in a rural farming area with them, showing amazing abilities and talents early on in life. But once he is bullied at school, the boy is sent on an evil path of retribution in this horror film based on the premise of Superman gone wrong. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Christopher Kimball's Milk Street Television
shows.description: In this episode, we learn three recipes inspired by the flavors of the Mediterranean. First, we make Provençal Braised Chicken elevated by fresh fennel, white wine, orange zest and saffron. Then, we prepare Sardinian Herb Soup with Fregola and White Beans, a hearty and herbal dish introduced to us by Chef Luigi Crisponi. Finally, it's a Spanish Shrimp & Chickpea Stew where a combination of smoked and sweet paprika adds deep color and earthy complexity. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Christopher Kimball's Milk Street Television
shows.description: Christopher Kimball demonstrates a bolder yet simpler way of preparing food. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Christopher Kimball's Milk Street Television
shows.description: Inspiration is provided from Briana Holt and the baked goods she serves at Portland, Maine's Tandem Coffee and Bakery. First, Briana and Chris make pineapple upside-down cornmeal cake with a fresh, caramelized fruit topping. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Christopher Kimball's Milk Street Television
shows.description: Milk Street sweets such as a Maple-Whiskey Pudding Cake and Spice Cookies are prepared. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Christopher Kimball's Milk Street Television
shows.description: Christopher Kimball visits Cheryl Day at Back in the Day Bakery in Savannah, Georgia, to learn treasured recipes from her repertoire of southern baking. First, it's Sweet Potato Cupcakes with Cream Cheese-Caramel Frosting, where the buttery, bittersweet caramel brings out the earthiness and warm spices in the cupcakes. Then, they make a Glazed Sour Cream and Brown Sugar Bundt Cake, inspired by old-fashioned butterscotch candies. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Christopher Kimball's Milk Street Television
shows.description: Christopher Kimball goes to Bologna, Italy, to discover a simple weeknight menu. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Dr. Death
shows.description: Duntsch gathers his defense as the trio amps up their efforts to seek the truth. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Christopher Kimball's Milk Street Television
shows.description: "Milk Street" travels to Mexico City in search of tacos. Back in the kitchen, Chris uses what we learned to demonstrate Dutch Oven Beef Birria Tacos; Rayna Jhaveri shows how to make Fresh Tomatillo and Serrano Chili Salsa; and Josh Mamaclay makes easy, yet flavorful, Ancho-Spiced Pork and Potato Tacos. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: The Pioneer Woman
shows.description: A frontier-style Friendsgiving celebration with Ree Drummond's two closest friends. Recipes include turkey roulade rolled around sausage stuffing; a leek-and-potato casserole; roasted Brussels sprouts and kale; boozy gravy; festive goat cheese; and a pomegranate champagne cocktail. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: The Pioneer Woman
shows.description: Ree makes a special meal for the curator of the Drummond family's historic home and museum. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Christopher Kimball's Milk Street Television
shows.description: Christopher Kimball makes two styles of chocolate cakes with Milk Street cooks Bianca and Rayna. He and Bianca whip up a luscious Chocolate-Hazelnut Cream Cake with a whipped ganache filling. Next, he bakes a Swedish Chocolate Cake with whipped cream topping with Rayna. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Christopher Kimball's Milk Street Television
shows.description: Christopher Kimball travels to Crete to learn classic Greek dishes from Marianna Leivaditaki. First, it's pork souvlaki with tzatziki and tomato-onion salad. As the perfect accompaniment, plush yogurt and olive oil flatbreads are made. Finally, broken phyllo cake with orange and bay is made, soaked with a syrup infused with cinnamon and cardamom that gives the cake a moist, pudding-like consistency. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Christopher Kimball's Milk Street Television
shows.description: Christopher Kimball heads to Emilia-Romagna for pasta recipes that have few ingredients and take little time. Milk Street Cook Lynn Clark shows how to make dumpling-like passatelli in brodo, parmesan flavored dough that's extruded through a potato ricer and cooked in broth. Chris then makes a quick chicken broth using chicken wings, and Milk Street Cook Lynn Clark prepares pasta with parmesan cream. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Traces
shows.description: Set against the stunning Scottish landscape in and around Dundee, three compelling female characters — Emma Hedges, Prof. Sarah Gordon and Prof. Kathy Torrance — join forces to uncover the truth about an unsolved murder case that's very close to home. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: The Pioneer Woman
shows.description: Ree Drummond serves up four weeknight dinner winners, starting with Shrimp Sheet Pan Pita. She assembles a taco bar for make-your-own Jalapeno Popper Tacos, makes Five-Spice Steak Bowls and dishes out Eggplant Parm One Pot Pasta. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: The Pioneer Woman
shows.description: A frontier-style Thanksgiving. Recipes include pumpkin gingersnap cheesecake with salted caramel sauce; broccoli wild rice casserole; no-knead clover leaf rolls; green beans and tomatoes; soul sweet taters; pumpkin smoothies; a toasty leftover Thanksgiving panini; festive goat cheese and pomegranate champagne cocktails; and turkey brine, turkey gravy and flavorful orange rosemary butter. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Castle Falls
shows.description: A blue-collar laborer, a correctional officer, and the henchmen of a notorious and incarcerated kingpin strive to outwit one another in their efforts to obtain three million dollars hidden at the abandoned Castle Heights Hospital after the laborer stumbles upon the loot while preparing the crumbling building for demolition at the behest of the city council. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: The Pioneer Woman
shows.description: Ree Drummond shortcuts Thanksgiving with fast favorites for the big day feast. She cuts the cooking time with a Spatchcock Turkey, bakes Stuffing Muffins and Brown Butter & Sage Pull Apart Bread, and serves Fruity Cream Cheese Puff Pastries for dessert. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Military Makeover
shows.episodeTitle: Meet our New Makeover Recipients: The Thomas Family
shows.description: The team heads to South Carolina to provide a home makeover for deserving veteran Jonathan Thomas and his family. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Dr. Death
shows.description: Duntsch strives to reconcile a botched surgery as Shughart acquires new evidence against Duntsch. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: The Pioneer Woman
shows.description: Ree Drummond makes her must-have Thanksgiving recipes. The feast includes her foolproof simple roasted turkey with an herby butter, easy cornbread and sausage stuffing, and classic giblet gravy. Plus, Ree shares the trick to a shortcut cranberry sauce. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: The Pioneer Woman
shows.description: In the Season 12 premiere, Ree offers ingenious ideas for dorm food. Included: waffle-maker pizzas, panini and quesadillas; Caesar and fruit salads in a bag; chocolate cake in a mug; and tea kettle noodle soup. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: The Pioneer Woman
shows.description: Ree Drummond is cooking dishes that are both simple and refined, starting with Crab Cakes and 5-Ingredient Remoulade. She also makes two main courses, Peppercorn-Crusted Steak with Pimento Creamed Spinach and Lemon-Thyme Sheet Pan Chicken and Potatoes. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Murder on the Orient Express
shows.description: In this engaging mystery set in 1930s Europe, detective Hercule Poirot probes a murder aboard the Orient Express. As the thirteen passengers grow paranoid that the killer will strike again, Poirot realizes there's more to the case than meets the eye. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Dead Silent
shows.description: In the 1990s, a sexual predator police dub "The Blue Light Rapist" goes on a serial attack spree across Arkansas. As authorities scramble to stop him in his tracks, he sets his sights on seventeen-year-old Shannon Woods. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Dead Silent
shows.description: A 23-year-old woman falls for a new man after recent breakup, but things take a wrong turn as they take their relationship to the next level. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Traces
shows.description: Set against the stunning Scottish landscape in and around Dundee, three compelling female characters — Emma Hedges, Prof. Sarah Gordon and Prof. Kathy Torrance — join forces to uncover the truth about an unsolved murder case that's very close to home. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Dr. Death
shows.description: Duntsch welcomes new patients in the Dallas area as the investigative duo acquires a new ally in their crusade against the physician. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: The Pioneer Woman
shows.description: Ree Drummond and her team have a casual office-warming party at their new space in town. Included: maple bacon dip with apples and easy Italian cheese sticks. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: The Pioneer Woman
shows.description: Ree Drummond is elevating four mundane, store-bought ingredients. She's turning a ready-made angel food cake into a stunning Baked Alaska, then she's taking a package of cookie dough and conjuring up Fruit Tarts. Ree's changing up a round white loaf into Roasted Garlic Four Cheese Pull-Apart Bread, and finally some humble can of tomato soup becomes beyond-good Tomato Soup 2.0. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: The Pioneer Woman
shows.description: Ree prepares a Tex-Mex feast for her hungry crew. Included: grilled chicken and beef fajitas with all the fixings; fiesta beans; cinnamon ice cream with cinnamon chips. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: The Pioneer Woman
shows.description: Recipes for a Thanksgiving feast include a turkey that's brined overnight; cornbread dressing with sausage and apples; sweet-roasted-rosemary-acorn-squash wedges; cranberry sauce; and green beans with tomatoes. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Breaking In
shows.description: A mother takes her teen children to her late father's high-security countryside home. Several men break in, hold the children hostage, and enable full security to lock her out. She breaks in, desperate to do whatever it takes for her kids' safety. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Carrie
shows.description: A shy teenager, dominated by a religiously fanatic mother, suffers at the hands of high-school bullies, whose mean pranks rile the teen into discovering she has telekinetic powers, which she uses to take ultimate revenge at the prom. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Mile 22
shows.description: James Silva (Mark Wahlberg) es un experimentado agente de la CIA, enviado a un país sospechoso de actividad nuclear ilegal. Cuando el funcionario local, LI (Iko Uwais), llega a la embajada de los EE. UU. buscando intercambiar información sobre material radioactivo robado a cambio de su paso seguro a los EE. UU., Silva tiene la tarea de transportarlo desde el centro de una ciudad, en una peligrosa misión, hasta una pista de aterrizaje a 22 millas de distancia. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Christopher Kimball's Milk Street Television
shows.description: Host Christopher Kimball takes inspiration from a focaccia originating in Bari, Italy, to create Pour in the Pan Pizza. Then, Milk Street Cook Rayna Jhaveri assembles the perfect side for a pizza party, Shaved Fennel, Mushroom and Parmesan Salad. We finish with Milk Street Cook Josh Mamaclay preparing Inverted Pizza with Onions, Potatoes and Thyme using store-bought dough for a perfect weeknight dinner. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Loving Pablo
shows.description: La periodista colombiana Virginia Vallejo mantuvo una relación amorosa en la década de los 80 con Pablo Escobar, el famoso narcotraficante. Ésta es su historia, con todas sus luces y sus sombras, el lado más humano del delincuente, pero también el más cruel y duro. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Christopher Kimball's Milk Street Television
shows.description: Christopher Kimball visits Japanese cooking instructor Sonoko Sakai to learn some of her favorite dishes to make at home. First, it's Japanese-Style Chicken and Vegetable Curry, taking inspiration from Sonoko's homemade curry powder blend. Then, we bake Japanese Milk Bread, a fluffy, slightly sweet and fine-textured loaf. Finally, we prepare a quick, refreshing side of Daikon-Carrot Salad with Sesame and Lemon. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Military Makeover
shows.description: Veterans shining within the environmental transport/construction, housing and medical industries. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Christopher Kimball's Milk Street Television
shows.description: A look at the various tastes and uses for chilies. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Christopher Kimball's Milk Street Television
shows.description: Lynn Clark makes Persian Jeweled Rice. Catherine Smart prepares Roasted Cauliflower. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Christopher Kimball's Milk Street Television
shows.description: Three different chicken dishes are prepared. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Christopher Kimball's Milk Street Television
shows.description: Christopher Kimball visits Paola Briseño González and Javier Cabral to learn about the flavors of Jalisco, Mexico. Back in the kitchen, Colima-style shredded braised pork is made and accentuated by smooth and subtly sweet coconut vinegar. Then, banana custard pie with caramelized sugar is baked for a simple, yet rustic dessert. Next, salsa macha costeña is made, followed by carne en su jugo, a brothy dish of short ribs and beans. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Good Bones: Risky Business
shows.description: Mina hustles to finish the exterior, the basement speakeasy, and the kitchen before Charlotte Hall's first wedding in four weeks. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Christopher Kimball's Milk Street Television
shows.description: Christopher Kimball travels to Mexico City to find new favorite weeknight suppers. He meets with Chef Esmeralda Brinn, who shows him Mexico's version of a meatball. Back in the kitchen, Milk Street Cook Catherine Smart teaches Chris to make Chicken Tinga (Tinga Poblana de Pollo), shredded chicken in a smoky tomato sauce that's an excellent filling for tacos. Then, Milk Street Cook Lynn Clark makes egg-stuffed Mexican meatballs with salsa roja in a flavorful chipotle sauce. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Good Bones: Risky Business
shows.description: Mina's project hits a critical snag with continual construction delays. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: The Perfect Murder
shows.description: New York City fashion photographer Joel Schoenfeld is shot dead in his Greenwich Village studio one cold January morning. Joel appears to have it all, but detectives will eventually uncover a dark secret and a twisted tale of revenge. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: The Perfect Murder
shows.description: Daniel Ott is just one day from moving with his girlfriend when an intruder shoots him dead with a shotgun. A stunning coincidence will lead the investigation into the heart of one of the most dangerous criminal rings in the country. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: The Perfect Murder
shows.description: When 39-year-old Dawn Viens goes missing in 2009, her husband claims she ran away to escape her problems. But the investigation leads detectives to an unexpected killer who disposed of the body in a most peculiar way. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Christopher Kimball's Milk Street Television
shows.description: A hearty meal of crispy German Pork Schnitzel with two side dishes is prepared. Techniques for making the dish's perfect crust are demonstrated along with the complete recipe and instruction. The side dishes are Croatian Mashed Potatoes with paprika and caramelized onions and a German Cucumber Dill Salad. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Dead Silent
shows.episodeTitle: Three Miles on Castle Rock Road
shows.description: A young Native American woman is found brutalized and clinging to life on the side of a rural Montana road. Her family and authorities seek answers. Their search for justice leads them down a shocking, sickening and devastating road. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Dead Silent
shows.description: Young love leads 15-year old high-school standout Jessica Keen down an increasingly rebellious path that culminates in a night of grave and unfathomable terror in rural Madison County, Ohio. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Traces
shows.description: Set against the stunning Scottish landscape in and around Dundee, three compelling female characters — Emma Hedges, Prof. Sarah Gordon and Prof. Kathy Torrance — join forces to uncover the truth about an unsolved murder case that's very close to home. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Tenet
shows.description: In the not-so-distant future, a special agent agrees to a risky new mission using the latest advancements in time travel and human evolution to change his present as rival nations vie for global supremacy, ushering in the threat of a third World War that could put an end to life on Earth. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Christopher Kimball's Milk Street Television
shows.description: All about quick desserts, from cake to mousse and rice pudding. To start, Milk Street Cook Erica Bruce prepares a Chocolate Olive Oil Cake, which is beautifully balanced with the addition of lemon juice. Then, Milk Street Cook Sam Fore makes a lighter, easier version of zabaglione, Mascarpone Mousse. To finish, making Rice Pudding with Bourbon, Orange and Cardamom, proving that arborio rice isn't just for risotto. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Triple Digit Flip
shows.episodeTitle: Floorplan Fail vs. Old Lady Layout
shows.description: Jamil and Pace scope out two properties in different parts of Phoenix; the first is in an area where buyers crave space, but most of the house is a crazy labyrinth of additions; the second selection is an outdated time warp of a home. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Til Death Do Us Part
shows.description: A couple's dream-come-true takes a quick turn and ends in tragedy. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Fast: Home Rescue
shows.description: Cody and Felicia work on a family house in Waverly, Tennessee and turns it into a funhouse after it was hit by a flood in 2021. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Til Death Do Us Part
shows.description: To most people, teenage sweethearts Steven and Michelle Gibson seem to be happily married. They have four children and live a fun and adventurous life together. But the couple is harboring a dark secret, one that will tear the family apart. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Til Death Do Us Part
shows.description: In 2014, police are called to a lifeless body in a trailer in Winona, Missouri. The owners, Jason and Stephanie McClurg, have suffered a series of misfortunes which have put their marriage under enormous pressure. But nobody expected it to lead to murder. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Still A Mystery
shows.description: He seems like a great partner. But when Susan Osborne and her 14-year-old son Evan disappear, it turns out "Mr. Right" has a secret. Then, when a young man is shot in a street confrontation, all clues point to one man. Could this case be that simple? Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Christopher Kimball's Milk Street Television
shows.description: Austrian dishes such as Rindsgulasch and Zwetchgenkuchen are prepared. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Christopher Kimball's Milk Street Television
shows.description: Erika Bruce teacher Christopher Kimball how to prepare a flourless chocolate cake Bete Noire. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Christopher Kimball's Milk Street Television
shows.description: Matthew Card makes a Vietnamese Shaking Beef. Christopher Kimball demonstrates how to season a wok. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Dr. Death
shows.description: Two physicians look into the gruesome treatment of a neurosurgeon's patients. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Christopher Kimball's Milk Street Television
shows.description: Khobz, a traditional all-purpose Moroccan flatbread, is featured. Then, Josh Mamaclay makes a flavorful Moroccan Harissa-Garlic Shrimp. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Good Bones: Risky Business
shows.episodeTitle: Can Mina Actually Pull This Off
shows.description: Mina is pressured to finish the Charlotte Hall renovations within eight weeks, but a major problem on the plumbing might put their schedule into a disaray. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Christopher Kimball's Milk Street Television
shows.description: Christopher Kimball visits the Amerigo restaurant in Bologna, Italy. He learned from its Chef Alberto Bettini that an authentic ragù Bolognese focuses on the meat and not on the dairy; Milk Street cooks Lynn Clark and Bianca Borges shows how to make Tagliatelle alla Bolognese and Lasagna Bolognese, respectively. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Christopher Kimball's Milk Street Television
shows.description: North African chicken couscous; chickpea and harissa soup; and how to make a harissa. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Triple Digit Flip
shows.description: Jamil and his team are on the hunt for their next flip in the greater Phoenix area. After touring two potential homes, they must decide on which one to allocate their funds for their best shot at a triple digit flip. But a mistake by Jamil makes the decision for them, leaving the team as the owners of a less than desirable opportunity and facing a steep uphill battle to make their usual profit. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Triple Digit Flip
shows.description: Jamil and team settle on a house that's in a hot Phoenix neighborhood. But when Rahima shocks Jamil with a big renovation budget, he becomes concerned their profit might not hit their six figure goal. And things get even more heated when brother and sister find themselves at odds over the design vision for this latest project. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Motorhead Garage
shows.episodeTitle: Ultra-Lightweight and Ultra-Stylish Wheels, The Ultimate Race Car Hauler
shows.description: Dave shows off an astoundingly lightweight wheel designed with Formula 1 technology and world-class style, a race car and toy-hauling trailer that leaves the rest in the dust, a revolutionary toolbox and workbench in one, and some tools to put in it. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Fast: Home Rescue
shows.description: The team work on the Marcel family house in Houma following the Hurricane Ida. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Christopher Kimball's Milk Street Television
shows.description: Christopher Kimball travels to Mexico City to make beans with Chef Eduardo García Guzmán. He also learns a quick recipe for tortilla soup and finds the best corn cake he's ever had. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Christopher Kimball's Milk Street Television
shows.description: A look at the New York cheesecake. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Christopher Kimball's Milk Street Television
shows.description: Cooks at Milk Street prepare one-layer cakes. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Christopher Kimball's Milk Street Television
shows.description: Christoper Kimball tries some classic baked goods in Paris. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Good Bones: Risky Business
shows.description: With the carriage house complete, Mina is finally ready to start transforming the main house at her Victorian passion project into a bed and breakfast. Despite a tight budget, Mina insists on restoring the historical, yet expensive, Victorian elements. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Christopher Kimball's Milk Street Television
shows.description: Bianca Borges demonstrates how to make Deep-Dish Quiche with Mushrooms, Gruyere, and Bacon. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Christopher Kimball's Milk Street Television
shows.description: A look at home cooking in Ho Chi Minh City to discover various Vietnamese dishes. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: The Garage With Steve Butler
shows.description: Steve demonstrates how to build a workbench that's perfect for small shop. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Christopher Kimball's Milk Street Television
shows.description: Features Italian-inspired recipes. Includes roasted mushroom pizza with fontina and scallion; cacio e pepe; and a simple shaved zucchini and herb salad with parmesan. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Triple Digit Flip
shows.description: Jamil and Pace hunt for a fix and flip in two very different neighborhoods. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Triple Digit Flip
shows.description: Jamil and team have a decision to make. There are two houses, but they can only flip one. The first house is completely cringe-worthy. The stench of animals. Rooms filled with piles of junk. And pigeons. The second house has some structural issues outside, but they weren't even able to get inside to check it out. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Motorhead Garage
shows.episodeTitle: Classic Stereo With Upgraded Sound, Getting the Best Throttle Response
shows.description: The crew installs a high-tech stereo that looks like original equipment for a classic. Other products include a device to take away throttle delay, a simple tool that made a rare Jeep vehicle restoration easier, and other must-haves for one's garage. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: The Garage With Steve Butler
shows.description: Steve shows how to build a mahogany tea caddy, perfect for entertaining, or as a gift. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Fast: Home Rescue
shows.description: Cody and Felicia Walker rebuild Brenita Reids' house in Antioch, Tenn., after it is badly damaged by a major flash flood in 2021. With only five days to pull it off, they transform the property into a Gospel Brunch church-themed home for Brenita. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Christopher Kimball's Milk Street Television
shows.description: Christopher Kimball travels to Bologna, Italy, to make two weeknight dishes with Chef Fabio Berti at Trattoria Bertozzi. He also speaks with travel writer Matt Goulding about the cuisine of Emilia-Romagna. Back at the kitchen, Milk Street Cook Catherine Smart shows Chris how to make simple and creamy pasta with zucchini, pancetta, and saffron. Then, Milk Street Cook Bianca Borges makes bolognese-style pork cutlets. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Christopher Kimball's Milk Street Television
shows.description: A trip to Rome in search of authentic Fettuccine Alfredo. Back in the kitchen, Christopher Kimball demonstrates the rich, yet simplified version of an often heavy and cream-laden dish. Milk Street Cook Bianca Borges shows Chris how to make Chocolate Biscotti with Pistachios, Almonds and Dried Cherries and Milk Street Cook Josh Mamaclay prepares Lemon Garlic Fettuccine. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Christopher Kimball's Milk Street Television
shows.description: Dishes such as Potato Gnocchi, Lamingtons, and Green with Pancetta Vinaigrette are prepared. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Christopher Kimball's Milk Street Television
shows.description: Chris puts the spotlight on European desserts. Recipes include: German apple cake; light and crisp Belgian spice cookies; and a Danish dream cake. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Christopher Kimball's Milk Street Television
shows.description: Lynn Clark prepares Italian dishes such as quick risotto with fresh herbs and spaghetti al Limone. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: The Garage With Steve Butler
shows.description: Steve builds some yard games, guaranteed to create some backyard fun. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: The Garage With Steve Butler
shows.description: Steve creates a mallet and a hand plane using recycled materials. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Good Bones: Risky Business
shows.description: With a new team in place and her hands firmly on the wheel, Mina is finally ready to finish the carriage house portion of this massive passion project. With plans to give the entire industrial loft design style, Mina takes a risk on a dark moody paint. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Christopher Kimball's Milk Street Television
shows.description: Christopher Kimball travels to the Galilee Valley to visit with author of "The Palestinian Table" Reem Kassis, who cooks maqlubeh, a multilayered chicken and rice dish worthy of a feast. Then, Chris heads to Tel Aviv to taste the classic semolina cake. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: The Garage With Steve Butler
shows.description: Steve creates a café-style table. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Christopher Kimball's Milk Street Television
shows.description: Heading to Crete to learn some classic Greek dishes. First, Chris and Milk Street Cook Lynn Clark make Greek Meatballs with Tomato Sauce (Soutzoukakia), a perfect addition to any meze spread. Then, Milk Street Cook Sam Fore demonstrates Greek-Style Baked White Beans in Tomato Sauce. Finally, Milk Street cook Bianca Borges prepares Greek Baked Vegetables, garnished with feta and olive oil. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Christopher Kimball's Milk Street Television
shows.description: Bianca Borges teaches Christopher Kimball how to create Baked Salted Salmon with Dill. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Fast: Home Rescue
shows.description: The team work on a house in Dawson Springs that was ravaged by an EF 4 tornado within five days. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Christopher Kimball's Milk Street Television
shows.description: Transforming a simple bowl of broth and rice into an explosion of flavors. Includes Thai rice soup; Thai stir-fried spinach; and an easy Thai beef salad. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Motorhead Garage
shows.description: How to keep one's vehicle running better and longer, how to get out of a jam with one simple tool, the best way to balance certain tires, and how to cut and etch any material with laser precision. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Christopher Kimball's Milk Street Television
shows.description: Matthew Card prepares Miso-Gochujang Pulled Pork. Christopher Kimball then teaches how to make Miso-Ginger Dressing. Lastly, Erika Bruce makes Roasted Cauliflower with Miso Glaze, a warm and rich way to upgrade weeknight veggies. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Christopher Kimball's Milk Street Television
shows.description: Recipes for holiday entertaining are featured. Dishes include an Argentinian-Style Pork Loin and a French Walnut Tart. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Christopher Kimball's Milk Street Television
shows.description: Lynn Clark demonstrates how to make Chicken and Bean Paella. Then, Chris prepares Seared Pork Tenderloin, Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Christopher Kimball's Milk Street Television
shows.description: Christopher Kimball travels to Beirut to learn how to make classic Lebanese comfort foods with chef Mohamad El Zein, the owner of Moona Restaurant, and cookbook author Anissa Helou. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Good Bones: Risky Business
shows.description: Mina's dream of turning a dilapidated Victorian mansion into a B&B and event space hits an early snag when the carriage house runs into delay after delay. After growing pains with her new team reach a breaking point, Mina makes a very tough decision. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Motorhead Garage
shows.episodeTitle: Professional Polish, Restoring a Classic Part 2, From the OR to Your Car
shows.description: Dave and his guests show how pros and regular folks can get the same quality shine, replace a door seal on a classic Chevy truck, and use medical technologies in the automotive world. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Good Bones: Risky Business
shows.description: Mina tackles a personal passion project, unlike anything she has ever done before: a historic yet dilapidated Victorian home. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Motorhead Garage
shows.episodeTitle: Dazzling Dually Wheels, A Fantastic Folding e-Bike
shows.description: Dave and the crew showcase super-strong dually wheels that are actually stylish, affordable e-bikes that perform with the big boys, a one-stop online shop for everything car care, and products designed to keep a car in tip-top shape. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Dr. Pimple Popper
shows.episodeTitle: My Giant Nose Is Killing Me
shows.description: Roger has enormous growths on his nose that drip pus, attract flies and are so large that he can barely breathe. Sandra and Jessie are sisters who bonded over their many undiagnosed face bumps. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Dr. Pimple Popper
shows.description: Stephen's large, bulbous nose gets him unwanted attention, and he hopes Dr. Lee can help. Veronica wants to be free of secrets, including the bump on her butt crack. Marty has a large, 30-year-old growth on his shoulder that he is ready to remove himself. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Elementary
