shows.description: A jogger killed in Central Park turns out to be the second wife of a former club owner (Larry Miller), who was tried for killing his first spouse. Margaret: Deborah Lee Johnson. Stamell: Cecelia Hart. Cruz: Rafael Baez. Giabone: Tony Darrow. Joyce: Elaine Tse. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
shows.description: A man Nick helped put in prison gets his conviction overturned and will be released, unless the CSIs can uncover evidence to prove he is guilty. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Dark Winds
shows.description: Leaphorn and his deputies fight the Buffalo Society. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Law & Order
shows.description: The investigation of a private investigator's killing leads to Little League baseball and the possibility of players being overage. Frank Leahy: Jon Seda. Victor Soto: Omar Rodriguez. Miguel Soto: Orlando Torres. Ramiro Benitez: Christian Castro. Tom Kelly: Louis Mustillo. Kevin Shore: Allyn Burrows. Briscoe: Jerry Orbach. Southerlyn: Elisabeth Rohm. McCoy: Sam Waterston. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Law & Order
shows.description: The detectives investigate the death of a woman whose body was found on an apartment-building terrace. Claire Snyder: Jayne Atkinson. Don Snyder: William Atherton. Jenny: Kelly Karbacz. Charles Gamett: James Rebhorn. Jim Snyder: Scott Schmidt. Gary Phillips: Joseph Murphy. Judge Mooney: Ben Hammer. Briscoe: Jerry Orbach. Southerlyn: Elisabeth Rohm. McCoy: Sam Waterston. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Law & Order
shows.description: The investigation of a girl's death leads to a case involving an unusual therapy technique. Janet Weston: Wendy Makkena. Stephen Olson: Spencer Garrett. Tyler Epps: Ezra Knight. Judge Antonia Mellon: Mary Lou Mellace. Briscoe: Jerry Orbach. Southerlyn: Elisabeth Rohm. McCoy: Sam Waterston. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Law & Order
shows.description: The investigation of the killings of two women leads to a hostage situation, in which Southerlyn responds to the suspect's request for a lawyer. Solomon: John Benjamin Hickey. Lydia Fernands: Susan Blackwell. Michael Hobbs: Gene Silvers. Alicia Williams: Debrah Ellen Waller. Capt. Bolland: David DeBeck. Lewin: Dianne Wiest. Southerlyn: Elisabeth Rohm. McCoy: Sam Waterston. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Secrets of a Gold Digger Killer
shows.description: Multimillionaire Steven falls for a good-looking waitress, Celeste, at the local country club. The 70-year old retiree marries the mother and spoils her with a luxurious life. After being admitted to a mental health facility for depression, Celeste plots a way to murder her husband in a bid to inherit his wealth. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: COBRA
shows.description: The Prime Minister assembles the emergency committee "COBRA" to respond to a potentially explosive situation in Kent. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
shows.description: The murder of a washed-up boxer who lived and trained in a brothel, and was detested by the prostitutes residing there, is investigated. Milton: James Whitmore. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
shows.description: The eighth season begins with Grissom and his team searching for Sara, who was kidnapped by the so-called miniature killer and left to die underneath a wrecked car in the desert. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
shows.description: The identity of the so-called miniature killer is revealed. As the CSIs track down the murderer, Sara mysteriously disappears and her personal relationship with Grissom is brought out into the open. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
shows.episodeTitle: The Good, the Bad & the Dominatrix
shows.description: Grissom investigates when a sadistic client tries to murder Lady Heather (Melinda Clarke) during a late-night rendezvous at an old West theme park. The probe is made more difficult when Heather refuses to name her attacker. Also, Grissom's reunion with Lady Heather makes Sara uneasy. Across town, Warrick and Nick investigate the death of a pickpocket who was apparently struck by a car. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
shows.description: A blackjack dealer is murdered and several of the suspects belong to a strange UFO club whose members believe that shape-shifting aliens have mated with humans in order to conquer the human race. Shannon: Ally Sheedy. DeVere: Enrico Colantoni. Clarissa: Julie Hagerty. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
shows.description: A popular high-school basketball player and his cheerleader girlfriend disappear after a big Friday-night game. Blood is found near a field house where the two hooked up after the contest and where things apparently got out of control. The investigation reveals a male cheerleader is in love with the missing girl and may know more than he is saying. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
shows.description: Grissom is shocked when he opens a package sent to him through the mail and finds a miniature crime scene inside. The discovery is all the more baffling since the serial killer responsible for other similar miniatures is now dead. The probe reveals the murder depicted has yet to take place but is likely to occur soon, so Grissom works to analyze the miniature and find the real location. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
shows.description: Keppler is put into a compromising position when the bodies of a Trenton police officer and a hooker are found in a hotel room. The man who found them is a retired New Jersey cop and close friend to Keppler, who doesn't reveal their relationship or that he also knew the dead man. The victims were shot to death and the left hand of the woman was cut off. Back at the lab, Grissom returns from his sabbatical and learns about the friction caused by Keppler while he was away. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Adopted In Danger
shows.description: When a DNA test helps Candace connect with her birth parents, she realizes some family histories are better left untold. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Keeping Up With The Joneses
shows.description: Nobody, least of all Pam, is sure about the proper way to handle her long lost daughter Eve, so they ask Sheldon for his counsel. Robin meets with Cam Forest, a duplicitous boat owner who may have witnessed what really happened to Webb in the marina. Meanwhile, the more that Eve is brought into the fold, the more it rankles Tara, who doesn't believe Eve is who she says she is. But all of this pales in comparison to the biggest shock of all: Webb is alive. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Keeping Up With The Joneses
shows.description: With new husband Webb now deceased, Robin stands to inherit a fortune with a little help from Sheldon, the family's lawyer. Carrie's philanthropic endeavors have always taken a backseat to the family's business ones, but now, with Lance at her side, she plans to expand her role. Kayla is enjoying the single life until she meets Carter whom she quickly falls for, and lest she be overshadowed, Tara begins an affair with her college professor. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Superfly
shows.description: Youngblood Priest is an Atlanta drug kingpin whose throne is threatened by a ruthless new crew with Mexican cartel connections. To protect his friends, family and mentor, Priest decides to get out of the game, but only after making one last big deal. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: The Old Man
shows.description: Chase and Zoe enter the lion's den. As Harper ends one partnership another begins. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
shows.description: Poirot wagers Insp. Japp that he can solve the disappearance of a wealthy banker within a week---and without leaving his apartment. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Thou Shalt Not Kill
shows.description: A child's body is discovered in a field, and fingers quickly point to the uncle. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Wanted
shows.description: A wimpy account manager (James McAvoy) is recruited by a sexy mystery woman (Angelina Jolie) to join a secret society of assassins and avenge the murder of his estranged father. Morgan Freeman costars in this non-stop action thrill ride. Directed by Timur Bekmambetov. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Pom Poms and Payback
shows.description: A cohort of teen cheerleaders vows vengeance against their boyfriends after their poor treatment. However, the girls fail to realize the cause underlying their struggles. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Dear Best Friend
shows.description: Dawn Goldie is a painter who seemingly has the perfect life. Thriving gallery, loving husband Alex, and adorable 2 year old son Lennox; but the tragic death of her best friend Cori two years prior still plagues her. On her birthday, Dawn mistakenly receives a mysterious gift, a novel, which immediately captivates her attention. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: My Husband's Secret Wife
shows.description: Recently married, Avery finds out that her new husband, Alex, has another wife. Then, Avery decides to inform the other wife, Melanie, of Alex's deception. However, instead of being angry with Alex, motherless Melanie seeks to steal Avery's son, Jack, and to eliminate the competition. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Killer Contractor
shows.description: Kerry and her daughter Ella return home to settle the estate of her late father, but the contractor they hire to fix up the house brings with him a series of lethal mishaps and shattering secrets. Alyshia Ochse, Zac Titus, and Mark Lawson star. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: The Wrong High School Sweetheart
shows.description: When Danielle reunites with her high school boyfriend, she is shocked to learn how far he's willing to go to keep everything alive. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Money Train
shows.description: Two cops, who are also foster brothers, plan a heist of a NYC train that carries the money made that day by the entire subway system. One needs the cash to pay off gambling debts, while the other wants to show-up his corrupt boss. Complicating matters is the female officer they both want to date. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Inspired to Kill
shows.description: A woman falls for a dreamy crime novelist, but she soon begins to question what she knows about the man after people who have wronged her start dying off. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Taken 3
shows.description: Former covert operative Bryan Mills must race to protect his daughter while tracking down the criminals who framed him for killing his ex-wife. Meanwhile, the FBI, the CIA and the police are hot on his trail. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Underworld: Awakening
shows.description: In this explosive installment of the hit movie series, Selene gets caught up in a brewing war between mankind and the creatures of the night after humans learn about the existence of vampires and werewolves and vow to exterminate them. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: The Usual Suspects
shows.description: The sole survivor of a failed heist is forced by the police to piece together events leading up to the deaths of his partners. Meanwhile, the motivations of the enigmatic criminal mastermind who planned the job remain a mystery. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: The Transporter Refueled
shows.description: A suave courier-for-hire gets involved in a bank heist perpetrated by two mysterious blondes, which in turn earns him the enmity of a fearsome adversary in this reboot of the high-octane action franchise. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Psycho Sister-In-Law
shows.description: After the death of their father, the half-sister of a father-to-be moves in her half-brother and his wife's happy home and brings danger as she seeks to claim the full inheritance. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: My Daughter's Deadly Date
shows.description: A mother embarks on a desperate search after her daughter disappears following a successful restaurant opening. Unseen dangers lurk as she uncovers the mystery. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: His Perfect Obsession
shows.description: Abigail Jones loses her eyesight at a young age. When her great-aunt dies, she helps her mother, Allison, tend to her funeral and affairs. Allison meets Bart, a strange accountant. Soon mayhem ensues, including the murder of Allison's philandering husband. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: The Good Father: The Martin MacNeill Story
shows.description: Weeks after his wife's suspicious death, Dr Martin MacNeill moves in his mistress under the guise of a live-in nanny. Shocked by her father's actions, his daughter begins to question everything she's known about him while uncovering a web of lies. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Bad Day at Black Rock
shows.description: Best Actor nominee Spencer Tracy stars as a one-armed World War II veteran who shows up in an unfriendly small Southwestern town looking for the father of a Japanese-American service buddy who saved his life in Italy, but receives a most unwelcome reception and finds himself in mortal danger. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Stolen by Their Father
shows.description: The story of a mother whose two young daughters are kidnapped by her abusive ex-husband—and her all-consuming fight to get them back. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Obsessed with the Babysitter
shows.description: Elaine catches the eye of a psychologist who thinks that she is the perfect woman. Upon realizing he is manipulating her mind, Elaine must escape with the children. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Switched Before Birth
shows.description: Switched Before Birth follows Olivia Crawford and her husband Brian, who after multiple miscarriages, numerous failed IVF trials and stretching themselves to the limit financially, finally receive the joyous news that she's pregnant with twins. While going through her latest round of IVF, Oliva meets and becomes fast friends with Anna Ramirez, who is struggling to have a child after years of focusing on her successful restaurants. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Escaping Dad
shows.description: A suburban mom with a seemingly idyllic life takes her two children and flees from her husband, an emotionally and physically abusive district attorney who uses his connections to put out an Amber Alert for his son after realizing that his family's gone. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: He Knows Your Every Move
shows.description: When her laptop stops working, Molly immediately takes it to a repair shop and thinks nothing of it when she gets it back in perfect working order. Soon after, she meets the charming and handsome Jack Newsom at her favorite restaurant. They share the same likes and dislikes, the same hobbies and are soon completing each other's sentences. Jack is perfect in every way until he slowly starts to exhibit a clingy, possessive side, which finally forces Molly to ask for some time apart. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Identity Theft of a Cheerleader
shows.description: After hitting rock bottom, Vicky steals the identity of a senior high school cheerleader to redo her final year of school properly. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Mother, May I Sleep With Danger?
shows.description: A mother's caught off guard when her daughter introduces the family to her new female love interest, and although she tries to embrace the modern romance, she soon makes a discovery about her daughter's girlfriend that could put her in serious danger. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Punisher
shows.description: The Marvel Comics superhero leaps into action in this gripping revenge thriller. When his family is slaughtered, FBI agent Frank Castle turns into a merciless fighting machine, intent on exacting brutal revenge on a crime lord and his ruthless squad of killers. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Psycho Intern
shows.description: After a one-night stand, a young male intern at a small startup stalks a new female project manager day and night in hopes of winning her over. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Van Helsing
shows.description: A legendary monster hunter is sent to Transylvania by a secret religious organization, where he battles Count Dracula, Frankenstein's creature and the Wolf Man in this homage to Universal horror classics. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Single White Female
shows.description: A New York City woman unwittingly accepts a psychotic roommate who begins emulating everything about her. By the time the unsuspecting woman glimpses her new roommate's bad side, it's already too late to change the locks. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Ruthless Realtor
shows.description: When Annie and Ralph Savage move into their dream home, their happiness is interrupted by their off-kilter realtor Meg who shows up at their home frequently unannounced and is obsessed with their relationship. As Annie and Ralph become increasingly uncomfortable with Meg's behavior, they push her away, but Meg refuses to go quietly, claiming someone is out to kill the Savages. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Room for Murder
shows.description: Kristen uncovers lies and secrets from Jake's dangerous past, since she is suspicious of her mother's new tenant. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Us
shows.description: Adelaide Wilson, her husband Gabe, her son Jason and her daughter Zora head to Santa Cruz, California, for a beach vacation at Adelaide's childhood home with their friends the Tylers. That night, the Wilsons are terrorized by a family of doppelgangers with murderous motivations. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Psycho Brother-In-Law
shows.description: A woman's brother-in-law begins helping out around the house while her husband spends long days at the office, but she soon realizes that he wants to be the new head of the family and will do anything to make that happen. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Family of Lies
shows.description: When their parents are killed in a mysterious car accident, Emily and her younger siblings move to a new small town in Louisiana. But when strange occurrences start happening, the family can't shake the feeling that they're being watched. As Emily unravels the mystery behind her parents' deaths, she soon realizes that she must be willing to protect the family she has left by any means necessary. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Hanna
shows.description: In this enthralling action thriller, teenage assassin Hanna (Saoirse Ronan) sets out on a dangerous mission and crosses paths with an intelligence operative (Cate Blanchett) who holds the key to her cryptic past and seeks to apprehend her at any cost. After being captured, Hanna makes a daring escape and flees to Germany to rendezvous with her father, who trained her in the art of survival. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Girl in the Shed: The Kidnapping of Abby Hernandez
shows.description: Abby Hernandez, a 14-year-old, goes missing while coming home from school in North Conway, New Hampshire. She is held captive in a soundproof container where she is subjected to psychological, sexual, and emotional abuse. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Tyler Perry's Acrimony
shows.description: Melinda supports her unfaithful husband for 18 years as he tries to make it as an inventor, but he seemingly replaces her with a new fiancée just as he finally finds success. Enraged and unhinged, Melinda plots her elaborate, violent revenge against those who wronged her. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Girl in the Box
shows.description: A hitchhiking woman is abducted by a young couple and held captive for seven years, during which time she's tortured and forced to live as a slave to her captors. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Kidnapping Mr. Heineken
shows.description: Childhood friends abduct the heir to the Heineken empire, but collecting the ransom proves onerous in this tense thriller inspired by actual events. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Saving My Baby
shows.description: After she's run off the road, expectant mother, Sarah, barely survives a harrowing crash. When she awakens days later, Sarah discovers that her baby has been taken. As she tracks down her child, she slowly uncovers the twisted scheme that led her to that moment. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Heat
shows.description: A successful career criminal considers getting out of the business after one last score with his crew, while an obsessive cop desperately tries to put him behind bars. The memorable "cafe scene" marks the first time Al Pacino and Robert De Niro have appeared on-screen together. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Fiancé Killer
shows.description: Nicole is stunned when her daughter Cameron returns from a vacation in Mexico engaged to handsome Brent. But Brent has a secret girlfriend, Lexi, and together they're planning to kill Cameron for her money right after her honeymoon. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Nightmare Wedding
shows.description: A woman's past affair with her fiancé's friend comes back to haunt her when he becomes the best man at their wedding and reveals his obsession for her. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Push
shows.description: A group of young Americans in Hong Kong who have telekinetic and psychic abilities band together to battle a sinister U.S. government agency that wants to exploit their powers. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Get Out
shows.description: While visiting his white girlfriend's family, an African-American man discovers that their seemingly idyllic community is hiding a sinister conspiracy in this perceptive, incendiary horror thriller. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Newlywed and Dead
shows.description: A newlywed investigates a string of murders surrounding her new husband and uncovers her beau's dark past. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Fatal Memories
shows.description: A woman suspects her sister, who suffers from severe emotional trauma, may be responsible for their mother's murder. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Repo Men
shows.description: This pulse-pounding thriller follows human-organ repo man Remy (Jude Law) as he attempts to evade his former partner Jake after he receives a replacement heart and subsequently falls behind on the payments for his new ticker. With Jake hot on their heels, Remy and another desperate debtor named Beth fight back against the Union, a producer of artificial organs known for taking body parts back by force when recipients fail to pay the bill. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Murder, She Wrote
shows.description: Jessica's friend Harry McGraw is accused of sending a fight promoter down for the final count. McGraw: Jerry Orbach. Blaster Boyle: Harold Sylvester. Dennis McConnell: Bradford Dillman. Sean Shilleen: Michael McGrady. Dave Robinson: LeVar Burton. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Goldfinger
shows.description: James Bond tries to nail a saboteur bent on depleting America's gold reserve by robbing Fort Knox. In order to stop his adversary, Bond has to survive several perilous situations, including a huge, deadly laser. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: For Your Eyes Only
shows.description: Roger Moore's 005th appearance as secret agent 007, James Bond, pits him in a race against the Russians to locate a sunken spy ship that contains an important technological device that, in the wrong hands, could prove costly to the British Navy. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Die Another Day
shows.description: Pierce Brosnan plays superspy James Bond for the fourth time in this action-packed adventure. This time out, 007 and an enigmatic woman named Jinx (Halle Berry) take on a madman with a satellite-laser weapon. Madonna sings the title song and has a cameo. Rick Yune. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Diagnosis Murder
shows.description: A social butterfly is behind a series of deaths at a prep school. Noelle: Danielle Harris. Kelly: Paige Moss. Susan: Kim Little. Eric: Will Estes. Chad: Jamie Bruneau. Lisa: Constance Zimmer. Shannon: Heather Marie Wayne. Dr. Sloan: Dick Van Dyke. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Diagnosis Murder
shows.description: Regis Philbin and Kathie Lee Gifford guest as talk-show hosts whose ratings stunt ends up with one shooting the other dead. Phyllis Diller and Army Archerd have cameos. Tom Grant: Todd Susman. Lucy: Mary Frann. Larry: Ian Ogilvy. Dr. Sloan: Dick Van Dyke. Steve: Barry Van Dyke. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Murder, She Wrote
shows.description: Robbery and murder fly first class to London as a jet-setter's diamond necklace is stolen and the bodyguard who was carrying it is poisoned. Jessica: Angela Lansbury. Errol Pogson: David Hemmings. Otto Hardwick: Robert Walker. Sonny Greer: Kate Mulgrew. Kay Davis: Robin Dearden. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Murder, She Wrote
shows.description: A riding instructor is unluckily prescient when he disguises himself as Washington Irving's headless horseman to harass his rival, a lovelorn poet. Jessica: Angela Lansbury. Dorian Beecher: Thom Bray. Doc Walker: Charles Siebert. Dorn Van Stotter: Guy Stockwell. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Murder, She Wrote
shows.description: An abrasive newsanchor is killed in a mysterious explosion aboard a boat that Amos (Tom Bosley) had leased for him. Jessica: Angela Lansbury. Nick Brody: Mark Stevens. Kevin Keats: Chad Everett. Paula Roman: Kathleen Lloyd. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Murder, She Wrote
shows.description: Jessica offers to help Thomas Magnum, who has been accused of killing a hitman with an unknown target.The crossover starts on Magnum, P.I. S07E09 Novel Connection (I). Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Murder, She Wrote
shows.description: A veteran reporter, who suffered a heart attack, says his best medicine would be the removal of his publisher who has turned a good paper into a yellow rag. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: The Gift
shows.description: In this nail-biting chiller, Simon and Robyn, a young married couple, find their lives thrown into a tailspin after Simon has a chance encounter with a former acquaintance, the off-kilter Gordo. Gordo then starts giving the couple unwanted and increasingly menacing gifts. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Evil Stepmom
shows.description: Twin sisters set up a dating profile for their dad, but the woman he meets plots to take advantage of wealthy single fathers. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Bloodshot
shows.description: This adaptation of the 1990s Valiant Comics character revolves around Ray Garrison, a resurrected soldier armed with the power of nanotechnology. After regaining memories of his former life, he rebels against the scientists who created him to pursue the man who killed him. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: The Wrong Cheer Captain
shows.description: Kate begins to suspect that Anna, the newly appointed captain of her cheer squad, is responsible for the death of Emma, but while Kate tries to find the truth, Anna is out to destroy her life. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Murder, She Wrote
shows.description: A diver is murdered in a search for sunken treasure off Cabot Cove. Jessica: Angela Lansbury. Amos: Tom Bosley. David Everett: Leslie Nielsen. Coby Russell: J. Eddie Peck. Susan Ainsley: Wendy Kilbourne. Gregory Small: Ian Ruskin. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Murder, She Wrote
shows.description: Attending a concert in Washington, D.C., Jessica gets involved with two East German defectors and a murder. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Murder, She Wrote
shows.description: There's no love lost when a tennis star is killed by a bomb planted in the car he borrowed from his girlfriend. Angela Lansbury. Carol McDermott: Linda Hamilton. Elliot Robinson: Van Johnson. Donny Harrigan: Doug McKeon. Cissy Barnes: Kelli Maroney. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Murder, She Wrote
shows.episodeTitle: If a Body Meets a Body
shows.description: A financial adviser's funeral is interrupted by a woman who claims he probably wasn't murdered, and by the discovery that the body in the coffin isn't his. Olston: Monte Markham. Phyllis: Audrey Landers. Connie: Carrie Snodgress. Stew: Rex Smith. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Diagnosis Murder
shows.description: Amanda's held hostage in a child-birth class by a man who believes that one of the expectant women is pregnant by him through unauthorized insemination. Bob: Sam McMurray. Sheryl: Lisa Cerasoli. Colleen: Mary McDonough. Amanda: Victoria Rowell. Dr. Sloan: Dick Van Dyke. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Diagnosis Murder
shows.description: On a rainy night, murder and intrigue involving a mother and daughter are served up for dinner guests Dr. Sloan and Amanda. Vivien: Adrienne Barbeau. Amy: Ele Keats. Dana: Andy Shreeman. Elena: Phila Oruche. Dr. Sloan: Dick Van Dyke. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Diagnosis Murder
shows.description: The nursing administrator is murdered during an emergency drill. Loretta Swit, Elliott Gould, Sally Kellerman, William Christopher, Jamie Farr. Karin Hatcher: Christopher Norris. Nurse Hilliard: Kim Little. Dr. Sloan: Dick Van Dyke. Amanda: Victoria Rowell. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Murder, She Wrote
shows.description: Jessica takes a personal interest in the murder of a cosmetic executive's fiancée, who was one of her most promising student writers. Lila Lee Amberson: Jayne Meadows Allen. Norman Amberson: Robert Culp. Glenda Vandevere: Millie Perkins. Jessica: Angela Lansbury. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Murder, She Wrote
shows.description: Jessica joins Seth on an archaeological dig at the possible site of Coronado's City of Gold, and unearths the murder of a guide opposed to the project. Gideon Armstrong: Robert Vaughn. Cynthia Armstrong: Connie Stevens. Dr. Arthur Benson: George Grizzard. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Murder, She Wrote
shows.description: When a woman is electrocuted in her bathroom, Amos chuckles that even Jessica can't make a murder out of it. Michael Dugby: Parker Stevenson. Harry Pierce: John Astin. Frederich Hoffman: Paul Benedict. Adam Frobisher: Christopher Stone. Edna: Evelyn Keyes. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Murder, She Wrote
shows.description: While teaching at a women's prison, Jessica is taken hostage by inmates rioting over an accusation that one of them murdered the prison doctor. Kathryn: Adrienne Barbeau. Warden Elizabeth Gates: Vera Miles. Bertha: Susan Paretz. Jessica: Angela Lansbury. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Single Black Female
shows.description: Monica is looking for a fresh start as she tries to land a gig as the host of an afternoon talk show. Then she hires Simone to be her personal assistant, and the pair become close friends. But underneath her sweet exterior, Simone harbors a dark secret, and plans to take over Monica's life for good. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Prometheus
shows.description: In this dazzling sci-fi epic, the crew of a spaceship embark on a voyage to a distant planet in hopes of discovering the origins of the human race, but instead they unleash a horrifying menace that could spell mankind's extinction. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Diagnosis Murder
shows.description: When Steve is badly wounded in a shoot-out, Dr. Sloan holds a crime lord accountable. But when the mobster is slain, Dr. Sloan himself stands accused. Part 1 of two. Masters: Fred Dryer. Tanis Archer: Susan Gibney. Ganza: Jack Carter. Canin: Neal McDonough. Judge Bartlett: June Claman. DA Ellison: Connie Blankenship. Spring Dano: Allison Dunbar. Eddie Tampa: Bruno Alexander. Carmen Martinez: Ludo Vika. Dr. Sloan: Dick Van Dyke. Copyright Rovi, Inc.

shows.title: Secrets of Playboy

Copyright Rovi, Inc.
